response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with decades of full-stack, web, and some embedded/systems experience, but he does not meet the hard requirements for this role. There is no indication of Japanese language proficiency (a stated native-level requirement), no Linux kernel investigation or source-modification experience, and only limited, dated C/UNIX work. His background centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms rather than L2/L3 networking, switch firmware, or security technologies like MACsec and 802.1X.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Some C/C++ systems experience (NI LabWindows/CVI components, Linux audio thesis project)
Strong software-craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement for the role
No demonstrated Linux kernel analysis/modification or embedded LAN-switch/networking security experience (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF)
C/UNIX proficiency appears limited and dated; recent work is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js and web-focused

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel or switch-security domain experience
Broad systems and embedded exposure with strong engineering practices
